prediction.reasoning: S&P Global (SPGI) is a high-quality financial services company with stable business fundamentals. Over a 6-day horizon, I estimate modest upward movement based on the stock's historical volatility of approximately 20-25% annually (roughly 1.3-1.6% daily). The point estimate reflects slight positive momentum typical for quality large-cap stocks. Confidence intervals are constructed using approximately 1 standard deviation for 50% CI, 1.28 standard deviations for 80% CI, and 1.64 standard deviations for 90% CI, accounting for the compressed time frame and SPGI's relatively lower volatility compared to broader market indices.
